_meta.note: Daemon-backed workspace snapshot create (omni P1). Captures a session's current working directory and bounded environment overlay and persists them as a restorable snapshot in SQLite. Returns the opaque snapshot id. The env is bounded before persistence (no unredacted host secrets).

unsupported_platform_error_example.message: daemon ipc error [UnsupportedPlatform]: persistent shell sessions are not available on this platform yet (PTY/ConPTY pending)

unknown_session_error_example.message: daemon ipc error [UnknownSession]: shell session 'ses_018f0000000000000000000000000099' is not known

invariants: session_id is required; name is optional
an unknown session fails with UnknownSession, never a synthetic snapshot
the persisted env is bounded (MAX_SESSION_ENV_ITEMS) and carries no unredacted host secrets
success payload contains only the opaque snapshot_id
